name: DCRAT
description: [DCRAT](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9017) is a variant of the open-source [AsyncRAT](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1087) developed in C# with additional capabilities such as patching Microsoft’s Antimalware Scan Interface (AMSI).(Citation: Zscaler BlindEagle DEC 2025)
